exercises.prompt: Which tense is for an action ALREADY FINISHED before another future action?
exercises.explanation: The futur antérieur (être/avoir au futur + participe passé) is the future's own past.
The finishing happens BEFORE the calling → futur antérieur after dès que: tu auras fini.

exercises.template: Quand j'{{b1}} assez d'argent, j'achèterai un vélo électrique.
exercises.explanation: Saving comes before buying → futur antérieur: quand j'aurai économisé.

exercises.template: Demain, nous {{b1}} au centre de tri.
exercises.explanation: Aller has the irregular future stem ir-: nous irons.

exercises.prompt: How is the futur antérieur formed?

options.text: être or avoir in the futur simple + participe passé
être or avoir in the present + participe passé

exercises.explanation: Auxiliary in the future + past participle: j'aurai fini, elle sera partie.

exercises.template: D'ici 2030, on {{b1}} réussi à réduire la pollution.
exercises.explanation: By 2030 = already done by then → futur antérieur: on aura réussi.

exercises.prompt: Match each ecology word to its English meaning.
Put the words in order: "As soon as you've finished, call me."
Listen to the announcement. What will happen, in what order?
exercises.transcript: Dès que nous aurons installé les panneaux solaires, la maison produira sa propre énergie.

options.text: First the solar panels get installed, then the house produces its own energy
The house already produces its own energy
The solar panels will be removed from the house

exercises.explanation: Futur antérieur (aurons installé) = first; futur simple (produira) = second.

exercises.prompt: Read the city's eco-plan and answer both questions.
exercises.passageFr: PLAN VERT 2030 — D'ici cinq ans, la ville aura installé des panneaux solaires sur tous les bâtiments publics. Dès que le nouveau centre de tri aura ouvert, nous recyclerons 80 % de nos déchets. Les bus électriques, eux, arriveront l'année prochaine.
exercises.passageEn: GREEN PLAN 2030 — Within five years, the city will have installed solar panels on all public buildings. As soon as the new sorting centre has opened, we will recycle 80% of our waste. Electric buses arrive next year.

questions.prompt: What will the city have done within five years?

options.text: Installed solar panels on all public buildings
Banned all cars from the centre

questions.prompt: When will the city recycle 80% of its waste?

options.text: Once the new sorting centre has opened
Next year, with the electric buses

exercises.prompt: « Quand on aura trié les déchets, on les recyclera. » — which happens FIRST?

options.text: They happen at the same time

exercises.explanation: The futur antérieur marks the earlier of the two future actions: sort first, recycle after.

exercises.prompt: Listen, then choose what it means.
exercises.transcript: Demain, on triera tous nos déchets.

options.text: Tomorrow, we will sort all our waste.
As soon as you've finished, call me.
By 2030, we will have managed to limit cars in the city.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word (from this unit's vocabulary).
Match each word to its English meaning.
Put the words in order: “Tomorrow, we will sort all our waste.”
Speaking practice — listen, then say the sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: Demain, on triera tous nos déchets.
exercises.targetEn: Tomorrow, we will sort all our waste.

exercises.prompt: Speaking practice — say this sentence aloud and record yourself:
exercises.targetFr: D'ici 2030, on aura réussi à limiter la voiture en ville.
exercises.targetEn: By 2030, we will have managed to limit cars in the city.
